title: 10 more structure
description: this mod adds 10 more structures to the the game
body:
this mod adds 10 more structures to the game,four of them have ther own loot
these structures include:
 


1-light house (with special loot)
 
2-mayas temple (whit loot)

3-ship (with loot)

4-abolhol (with loot)
 
5-balloons

6-castle

7-windmill

8-medival house

9-plains house

10-japanese temple
 

if you want to find structures with command you have to type:
(after "more_structure" you can type name of that structure you want)


 you canse images of each structure with its description in the mod gallary

If you like my mod, you can donate to me by clicking the donation link and then clicking on 
international donate
Thank you for your donations. 

اگر ایرانی هستی سلام هموطن!! میتونی با استفاده از لینک دونیت من رو به تومن دونیت کنی و از ایران و ایرانی حمایت کنی.
عشق منی!

 
i hope you enjoy this mod
